commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Not a repair candidate: the remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and protected maintainer-label review, not a narrow code defect for automation to fix.; Cleared: The diff only changes shared agent media-task state handling and colocated tests; it does not add dependencies, workflows, secrets handling, or package/code-execution surfaces. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes shared media-generation task completion so successful generation remains completed when requester completion delivery is unconfirmed or throws, with new regressions for delivery misses and generation failure.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +42. Total +48 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for a source-level reproduction: current main can be exercised with a lifecycle wakeTaskCompletion stub returning false or throwing, which currently turns successful generation into task failure. I did not run a live media-generation scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Not a repair candidate: the remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof and protected maintainer-label review, not a narrow code defect for automation to fix.

target.title: fix(agent): preserve media task success on delivery miss
target.body:
Summary
- Keep successful media generation tasks completed even when requester completion delivery is not confirmed.
- Log completion delivery misses without converting them into a second failed task wake.
- Add regressions for unconfirmed delivery, throwing delivery wake, and true generation failure.

Proof
- Distill pass: separated task generation state from requester delivery state; delivery miss is telemetry, not generation failure.
- git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD
- CI=1 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node --no-maglev ./node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run src/agents/tools/media-generate-background-shared.test.ts --reporter=dot --testTimeout=10000 --hookTimeout=10000
- Result: 2 test files passed, 10 tests passed.
target.author: obviyus
